name: Chocolate Swirl Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Package (11.1 oz.) JELL-O No Bake Cheesecake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX the dry ingredients (crumbs, sugar) and melted butter thoroughly with a fork in a 9-inch pie plate until crumbs are well moistened.
2. Press the mixture firmly against the sides of the pie plate first, using your finger or a large spoon to shape the edge.
3. Press the remaining mixture firmly onto the bottom of the pie plate.
4. MICROWAVE the chocolate and 2 tablespoons of milk in a microwavable bowl on HIGH for 1-1/2 minutes, or until the chocolate is almost melted. Stir until completely melted.
5. BEAT the remaining cold milk and filling mix with an electric mixer on low speed until blended. Beat on medium speed for 3 minutes. The filling will be thick.
6. SPOON most of the filling into the crust.
7. STIR the chocolate mixture into the remaining filling to create a marble swirl effect.
8. COOL in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving. Garnish as desired and store leftovers in the refrigerator.
